rows.title: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release 39m ago Kabra Drugs received Chhattisgarh LOI for ₹200 crore pharma facility at Nava Raipur Pharma Park.
General Updates 2h ago Consortium wins ₹108.4 crore DBOT sewage treatment project at Koladi, with 18-month construction and 10-year O&M.
Shareholders meeting 2h ago Postal ballot resolutions passed on 12 Jun 2026: object clause change, higher authorised capital, QIP/private placement, independent director appointment.
Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Outcome of EGM 5h ago EGM held on 14 June 2026 approved capital increase and preferential issue of convertible equity warrants.
Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015 6h ago Company informed of arrest of Independent Director Gautam Doshi; says no company impact expected.
Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) Amit International reported several audit qualifications, including Rs232.26 lakh doubtful advances and Rs24.91 lakh uncharged interest.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order Ceinsys Tech and subsidiary win T Second Inc USA orders worth Rs 30.06 crore, executable by June 30, 2026.

Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Update On GST Proceedings - Demand Proceedings Dropped. Chennai GST authority dropped ₹1,352.92 crore demand for FY23; no liability rem
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment 31.18 lakh equity shares allotted on warrant conversion; company raises Rs 3.50 crore from promoter Surplus Finvest.
Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. Call Updates Transcript of H2/FY26 call: 1MW solar, 10-ton hammer and 2,000-ton press, FY27 revenue target 150-160 crore.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Mr. Pradeep Singh Chauhan resigned as CFO effective 13 June 2026.

Revised Receipt Of Letter Of Intent From Chhattisgarh Government For Proposed Investment Of Rs. 200 Crore In Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Project At Nava Raipur Pharma Park Received LOI for ₹200 crore
Outcome of Board Meeting Board approved revised lease and machinery hire for Dholpur plant; rent rises to Rs 6 lakh monthly, capacity to 1,200 tonnes.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management Morarjee Textiles appoints three non-executive directors under NCLT-approved resolution plan, effective 4 June 2026.
Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015. NLC India declared preferred bidder for Govindpur vanadium, titanium and aluminous laterite block on 12.06.2026.
Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts Vdeal System won ₹12.38 crore order for Power System and Automation Panels, deliverable by 10-Aug-2026.
Resignation Two independent directors, Ayush Garg and Kailash, resigned effective 12 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Director Mr. Karthik Iyer resigned as Executive Director effective 13 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management Board approved up to ₹10 crore unsecured loan from MD and reappointed internal auditor for FY27.
Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Scrutinizer"s Report Shareholders approved preferential issue of fully convertible warrants and reappointment of Swetha Gopalan as independent director.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate Sachin Srivastava appointed Whole Time Director and CEO; Karthik Iyer resigned, effective 13 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management Board approved migration to BSE/NSE main boards, appointed two independent directors, and scheduled postal ballot.
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Board approved ₹10 crore unsecured loan from MD at 8% for working capital and general purposes.

Order Dated 12 June 26 Passed By The Hon'Ble NCLT  In Relation To The Proposed Scheme Of Arrangement Between Sammaan Capital Limited (Resulting Company) And Sammaan Finserve Limited 'Demerged Company)
Outcome of Board Meeting Chief Financial Officer/CEO Avula Harip... resigns from Vilin Bio Med.

Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Today I.E. On Saturday, June 13, 2026, In Terms Of Second Proviso To Regulation
30(6) Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 Board approved SME-to-

Receipt Of Letter Of Intent From Chhattisgarh Government For Proposed Investment Of ?200 Crore In Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Project At Nava Raipur Pharma Park Received LOI for ₹200 crore pharma man
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 13Th June 2026 Board appointed Sachin Srivastava as Whole Time Director and CEO on June 13, 2026; Karthik Iyer resigned.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order Atishay won West Bengal work order for Ayushman cards worth ₹11.16 crore, to be executed in nine months.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Company Secretary / Compliance Officer Company Secretary and Compliance Officer Rishika Verma resigned, effective 13 June 2026.
Allotment of Securities Board allotted 3,16,500 shares preferentially at Rs55, raising Rs1.74 crore on June 13, 2026.
Outcome of Board Meeting Board allotted 3,16,500 equity shares at Rs.55 each, raising Rs.1.74 crore via preferential issue.
Board Meeting Outcome for Resignation Of Additional Director _Mr. Mukesh Manveer Singh Mukesh Manveer Singh resigned as Additional Director effective 12 June 2026; board accepted resignation.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Director Mukesh Manveer Singh resigned as Additional Executive Director effective 12 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Jenisha Het Shah resigned as CEO effective 13 June 2026.
Update Mumbai High Court granted bail to NESCO VP (Events and Exhibitions) on 12 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release Cyient approved buyback of up to 6.4 million shares for ₹7,200 million at ₹1,125 each; record date June 17, 2026.
Receipt Of Letter Of Intent From REC Power Development And Consultancy Limited Received LOI from REC PDCL for WR-ER Inter-Regional Network Expansion Scheme Part C in Jharkhand.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management Mr. Manish Vasavada appointed Deputy CEO from COO effective June 15, 2026.
Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts K2 Infragen wins ₹3,158.58 crore Konkan Railway order for North Western Railway traction upgrade, executable in 24 months.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release Launched Bosutinib Tablets 400mg in the U.S. on June 13, 2026, with 180-day exclusivity.
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On Today I.E 13.06.2026 Board approved 77.02 lakh warrants at ₹779 each to promoters; EGM scheduled for 9 July 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order Ashoka Buildcon received LOA for Raipur Gems & Jewellery Park PPP project; premium Rs112.40 crore.
Shareholders meeting EGM on June 12, 2026 approved preferential equity share issuance to promoters and non-promoters.
Submission Of Draft Letter Of Offer For The Proposed Rights Issue Of Ducon Infratechnologies Limited Ducon filed draft letter of offer for a proposed rights issue up to Rs 25 crore.
Allotment of Securities Board allotted 8,95,000 equity shares on June 13, 2026, raising Rs. 12.15 crore through warrant conversion.
Outcome of Board Meeting Board allotted 8.95 lakh shares on June 13, 2026, raising Rs. 12.15 crore through warrant conversion.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release MoEFCC granted environmental clearance for Bhaskarpara Coal Mine expansion to 1.2 MTPA on 12 June 2026.
